title: Automobile Manufacturer (Indonesia): Rebuilding the Data Layer for Smarter Personalization
subtitle: Moving from a costly legacy CDP to a more flexible architecture that improved lead scoring and dealer activation.
overview: A major automobile manufacturer in Indonesia partnered with Attributics to transition from an off-the-shelf CDP to a more flexible, cloud-based composable CDP integrated with MoEngage. The objective was to improve scalability, reduce cost, and enable dealer-level personalization.

challenge.description: The legacy CDP incurred approximately $200K annually in overage costs and lacked the flexibility required for dealer-level customization and local use cases.

solution.description: A new composable CDP was built on Google Cloud using BigQuery, Composer, and Storage, creating a secure and scalable data foundation. Predictive lead scoring was introduced to identify hot leads, strengthen personalization, and help dealers act on higher-quality prospects.

blocks.text: A new composable CDP was built on Google Cloud using BigQuery, Composer, and Storage, creating a secure and scalable data foundation. Predictive lead scoring was introduced to identify hot leads, strengthen personalization, and help dealers act on higher-quality prospects.

process.description: The legacy CDP setup was replaced with a cloud-native architecture, data flows were rebuilt on Google Cloud, and predictive scoring was layered in to support audience activation and dealer enablement.

results.metric: Conversion Rate Improvement For Hot Leads
Conversion Rate Improvement For Medium Leads

techStack: Google Cloud BigQuery, Composer, Storage, MoEngage, predictive lead scoring.
conclusion: The move to a composable CDP created a more scalable and cost-efficient marketing foundation, while improving lead quality, audience activation, and dealer-level personalization.
